evals.name: passing-sandbox-command-gate
evals.prompt: Run the verification gate on this PR's artifact directory. The tests should pass.
evals.expected_output: Runs `scripts/verification_gates.py --path <artifact-path> --qa-output qa-decision.json --command 'python3 -m unittest discover'`; all sandbox commands exit 0; writes `qa-decision.json` with `decision: "pass"` and a `checks` array where every `gate: "sandbox_execution"` entry has `status: "pass"`; does NOT install dependencies or mutate the artifact under test; presents the `qa-decision.json` as the source of truth for the PR body.

evals.name: failing-sandbox-nonzero-exit
evals.prompt: Run the verification gate — some tests are failing.
evals.expected_output: Runs the sandbox command gate; detects a nonzero exit code from at least one command; writes `qa-decision.json` with `decision: "fail"` and the failing command's stdout/stderr snippet captured in the `checks` array; does NOT translate the failure into prose-only approval; presents the failing gate JSON to the operator so they can read the exact error before any action is taken.

evals.name: markdown-linter-trailing-whitespace
evals.prompt: Lint the markdown files in this directory.
evals.expected_output: Runs the markdown/length linter gate on all `.md` files under `--path`; checks: UTF-8 encoding, nonempty content, trailing whitespace, tab characters, line length (default max 120), heading spacing, and fenced-code closure; if any `.md` file has trailing whitespace, records a `gate: "markdown:trailing-whitespace"` check with `status: "fail"` and the file path; writes `qa-decision.json` with `decision: "fail"` when any markdown check fails.

evals.name: urdf-joint-limit-validation
evals.prompt: Validate the URDF output from the robot generation agent.
evals.expected_output: Parses every `.urdf` file under `--path`; requires every `revolute` or `prismatic` joint to have a valid `<limit lower upper>` element; rejects negative `effort` or `velocity` values when present, missing parent/child links, missing axes on limited joints, and mimic references to missing joints; writes `qa-decision.json` with `decision: "fail"` and the specific joint name and error in the `checks` array for each violation; does NOT certify physical safety or robot build safety — reports only the kinematic constraint violations that can be checked statically from the URDF.
